steps.action: Validate response body is valid JSON
steps.observed: Valid JSON object parsed successfully via python3 -m json.tool

steps.action: Check all four required keys are present
steps.expected: eos_token, bos_token, pad_token, chat_template all present
steps.observed: All four keys present in response object

steps.expected: Each value is either a non-empty string or null (not missing/absent)

steps.observed: chat_template key is present with value null — fix confirmed working

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 1 passed. VAL-TOK-001 confirmed working — GET /v1/tokenizer_info returns HTTP 200 with valid JSON containing all four required keys (eos_token, bos_token, pad_token, chat_template). The critical fix from commit b33ac29 is validated: chat_template is present in the response with value null (not missing). All values are correctly typed as string or null.
